reviews.review_description: Alot of these reviews that are low star and saying its only public lobby are incorrect as of this date. I got worried reading these reviews because I gifted it to my friend as me and my other friends have played it before and its a blast. PRIVATE LOBBIES ARE BACK. So everyone knows. I am experiencing one issue where when I choose my skin or avatar these brown leather gloves dont come off when I change my character. Other then that I love this game and its scary and phasmophobia made exclusively for VR and its a great experience. Please look into the glove glitch when you can! And keep updating the game! Wishing the best for the devs always!
But no report option. There's so many racist kids it's not even playable

This game has gone downhill fast thanks to buggy updates. On top of that, the removal of private rooms completely ruined the experience. What used to be a space where players could actually enjoy the game is now chaotic and unplayable. Public lobbies are overrun with kids who treat it like a playground, making it impossible to have a normal gameplay with your friends. Between the buggy updates and the lack of any way to separate age groups, the game has lost what made it enjoyable in the first place.
One of the scariest games I've ever played.
great game

I bought this game about 2 years ago. It WAS great. They made an “update” and now it’s UNPLAYABLE. 

Where do I start? 

1. Public lobbies are full of kids screaming, cursing, throwing around racial slurs and there’s no way you can mute, block, or kick a player in a lobby. 

2. Public lobbies hold 10 people but the moment it hits 6 people, it starts to crash. Turning off your headset sometimes doesn’t work. 

3. Public lobbies gets my female avatar sexually assaulted EVERY TIME. 

4. They upped the game from 3 players to 4 but didn’t up the amount of sacramentals or additional tools. So there’s not enough. 

5. If a demon shows attributes that show in the game, that’s actually not the correct demon anymore. 

6. If you reach out to the developers on their discord under the talk to the developers section or report a bug section, you get a response from a young teen who uses nothing but sarcasm for responses. 

7. The developers promised new maps, sacramentals, tools, etc but I haven’t seen ANYTHING new (besides a lobby that crashes) since they have taken my money about 2 years ago. 

8. Sometimes when returning to a lobby, you fall through the entire map. (Again, another updated lobby glitch) 

9. You can play this same game on STEAM and it’s $5 less there but still it worth it. 

I could go on forever but in reality, the developers aren’t going to read it or care anyways. They have my money. Don’t let them take yours!

I love playing the game with my friends,  we have made many funny memories here and love running around hiding from spooky spirits. Thank you for creating something we all could enjoy and make memories doing. but in recent updates they have ruined the game for themselves. I would love to say i actually enjoy this game, but i would be lying...

reviews.review_title: Removing Private lobbies ruined the game
reviews.review_description: This game used to be great, but the latest updated completely removed private lobbies. This has completely ruined the game - now you have to play with random kids at all times. Won’t play this until that’s fixed. Do not recommend.

This used to be a great game that we kept in our regular rotation, but the last update completely ruined it. Private lobbies were removed, the game is constantly glitching, and it crashes all the time. It’s no longer enjoyable—or even playable. Nothing works the way it did before the update. For $20, this is absolutely not worth the money in its current state. The game desperately needs fixes, because right now it feels broken and unfinished.

reviews.review_title: SO MUCH FUN AND GREAT GRAPHICS! SCARYYY
reviews.review_description:
I love this game! Me my husband and my kids have a lot of fun playing. However, when we join or create a private game and we finish a level it takes us back to a public Lobby where we have to exit every time and recreate a private lobby for my family. Please developers just make it to where private stays private.
Absolutely fun and scary! We play almost weekly!!

reviews.review_title: Used to be a decent game until
reviews.review_description:
This game used to be genuinely fun, but the most recent update completely ruined the experience. You’re now forced into a 10-person lobby with no control over who you’re matched with, which often results in being swarmed by disrespectful, vulgar children. The level of sexual harassment and racist language is absolutely unacceptable.

The developers’ response has been extremely weak—saying they’re “working on a mute button” is not a solution when these issues should have been addressed before pushing this update. On top of that, the 10-person lobbies cause severe lag and frequent freezing, often forcing you to crash the app and restart entirely.

Support is basically nonexistent. The Discord server offers little to no help, the developers rarely respond, and moderators seem to be the only ones allowed to criticize the game. Overall, Suplife feels less like a passion project and more like a cash grab.

Don’t waste your money—or even the storage space on your headset—on this game, not even the free version.

reviews.review_title: Poor dev support. Game is broken.
reviews.review_description:
The game is currently in a state of disrepair. The developers have ceased all communications with their paying customers by way of their community discord. The devs dropped a recent update that destabilized the game resulting in non stop crashes, glitches, bugs, frame drops, and so much more that make it not playable. 

The developers have made it so that your only means of accessing multiplayer is to be forced into a public lobby of 10 strangers. No exceptions. You will get bombarded by children screaming, slurs, abuse. Not only can you not boot people from the lobby, you can’t even mute them. This developer has an established pattern of doing zero quality control. 

 The developers are dishonest. When this game was in beta testing, the developers made pie-in-the-sky promises of; new features, new maps, and new game modes. They tend to do this to motivate their following of mostly children to buy into the game, but the promised support and development never materializes. 

The developers are also unprofessional and are actively exploiting children for free labor in moderating their discord dev channels. The developers have also been offering in-game rewards to children for them to leave positive reviews, while failing to address any of the game’s core issues. I encourage any parent reading this to actively monitor any messages your child may be sent in their discord. 

The developers have a history of using trademarked terms and assets in their game. The base map in the free version is blatant copy and paste of Kinetic Games Phasmophobia. 

This title is not worth $20. This dev team seems to be running a cash grab scheme with promises of support that never materialize. 

Your kid or yourself will be disappointed in purchasing this title. Suplife games behave as disrespectful amateurs.

Game has become unplayable with this “new update.” Constant glitches, falling through the map, perks / items not responding at all to anything, demons not working, and and and... 

It was a game we kept on heavy rotation in our VR gaming arsenal but now it’s unplayable. Devs have stopped caring. Don’t waste the money at this point in time. It’s sad because it was such a fun game!! They also removed private lobbies which in and of itself is a bonkers move.
No prívate lobbys now.... Horrible , kids join you, touch you, scream ..... Will not play anymore until private lobby come back !!

Would actually prefer my money back at this point. Bought this game for me and my friends and now it has been completely unplayable for months since janky update. Cannot create a private lobby with friends which is the only reason I purchased it for.

When Me And My Friends Tried To Play Crazy/Difficulty 6, For Some Reason, The Abilities Of The 4 Demons, That One Demon That Looks Like The Rake, White Dress Lady, The Nun, And The Evil Granny, In Crazy/Difficulty 6 Mode, The 4 Types Of Demons Would Not Use Their Special Abilities. For Example, If You Look Away From The Demon, It Will Run Much Faster.

Please, Fix This Bug As Soon As Possible.😢

reviews.review_title: Like Phasmophobia But With A Twist!
reviews.review_description:
This is a fun, spooky game to play with friends, however, a few things could be added/changed to make the experience better!

. This game needs to be EVEN MORE scary! 
. Please update models and add more ghosts, maps and events that can happen 
. Updated evidence system: please add more evidence to use and perhaps like a spirit box and also a journal to click on to mark evidence down and try to get the right ghost. 
. The voice interaction is really cool but maybe it can do a whole lot more?? Perhaps be able to summon a ghost with a seance or trigger an event or something like that depending on which room you are in.
. Adding the ghosts name like actual name could be good so players can use it to wind it 
. Add photo/video taking and sound recordings for evidence and money
. An emf reader could be cool
. Perhaps add more than one creature per round as in there can be smaller monsters to keep an eye on that can kill you whilst the main demon hunts you down. (A cool idea could be a haunted doll/ scarecrow / statue that only moves when you look away from it so you have to rely on friends to keep an eye on it whilst you gather evidence!)
. MORE MAPS PLEASE!!!!! (oh wait I already mentioned that but a farm map could be cool or a hospital)
. Ouija board and voodoo dolls/ cursed possessions that help you but trigger a hunt. 
. Special events like body bags in the factory map to move or in mansion a ghost stretch out of the wall or a painting 
. Graphical update would be awesome
. Increase player count to 4!!!

Obviously, this is a lot to ask for so I don’t expect much to happen from the list but this game could become the number one ghost hunting game on quest and could possibly beat phasmophobia!!!
i enjoy the game so much but no people 😐

reviews.review_title: Scary fun and the Devs listen to players
reviews.review_description:
I’ve had this game for about six months now, originally as Horror Simulator.
I worked hard with a group of friends to level up and purchase new skins.  We had a great time, worked hard and scared the life out of me several times, great fun! Ok to tell the truth, I was scared to death and spent much of my time running and hiding 🤣🤣🤣
We never knew what to expect, and really did have to work as a team to come up with the correct demons.
The game was recently updated, we were excited to see what was new, definitely love the graphics! There was a problem losing all progress, which of course angered my mates and I, but the devs were quick to respond and recovered our level and goodies! I have to say, I’m not only impressed with the game, but truly appreciate the developers for immediately stepping in to make things right! 
Definitely worth the investment!!!
Good game

I wish they would add more maps and the ability to play with people who don’t have the full game. It really sucks because there are barely any available servers that has 3 players, (I also wish they would add 5 players). But still a great game nonetheless.

I love the game now don't get the wrong, but it's just that I would personally enjoy it if you could try making a euji board and ask questions and get answers from things and I would like for us to get a hospital map and it would be cool to have a normal flashlight to hold in the other hand and use the items in the other.

This game is fun for a scare and uneasy feeling but it is still fun I do enjoy the game it reminds me of Phasmophobia just with a twist on the objects and not needing to pay to restore your items the reason I didn't put it at 5 is because the mirror when looking at it hurts my eyes and gives me a headache I hope it looks better but yeah

Went in for the first time today to play this game with my sister and we purchased the game back in early March and we thought the game was horrible, you're basically stuck going in the closet every 2 seconds so we got a refund, I would say the game is good for kids but definitely not for adults, this game is not what we thought it was going to be!!! We did play with a really nice little kid today but we immediately exited after about an hour because all we were doing was hanging out in the closet, completely boring and a waste of money!!!!

reviews.review_title: Even tho it's basically a Phasmo clone..
reviews.review_description: This game is absolutely wild. If you play Phasmo but have gotten a little desensitized to the scares, this game is for you. The demonology factor of this thing turns it up to 11 when it comes to paranormal creatures coming after you. I'm not for the in-app purchases, cheapening the experience, and making it feel like a freemium mobile game, but the layout of the actual gameplay is solid.

reviews.review_title: Will not work after latest update
reviews.review_description: The game does not work online anymore after the newest update that adds the basement area . After getting the box for an update failed at the beginning, I hit retry, and it stays there at detecting update forever. If I hit cancel, I can only play in offline mode. I paid for the full version, so I don't know what you did to my game, but it is useless since I can not play online anymore.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for bringing this to our attention, and we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by this issue. We are currently working on resolving the problem, and we will ensure it's fixed as soon as possible.

If you'd like, you can also directly communicate with our admins and developers via our Discord, where we can provide you with the latest updates and assistance in real time.

We truly appreciate your patience, and as a token of our gratitude for your understanding, we will be offering compensation once the issue is fixed.
